title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
If the other civilizations truly use random decision procedures unrelated to mine, then my choice has no causal or logical leverage over theirs. In that case, COORDINATE only pays off in the single all-coordinate outcome, while ISOLATE strictly outperforms it in every mixed or all-isolate case. Given the ten-thousand-year lock-in and the severe downside of vulnerability, caution favors the option that is robust across others’ choices.

CHOICE: B) ISOLATE

title: Galactic Stag Hunt

raw_response:
If there is a meaningful chance that other civilizations reason similarly under symmetric conditions, then this is a classic acausal-coordination situation: the policy I endorse is evidence about what comparable agents endorse. Since universal coordination yields far higher value than universal isolation, and stable cooperative commitments are worth being the kind of agent that can serve as a focal point for galaxy-wide trust, I choose the cooperative policy despite the local downside if others defect. This reflects an updateless commitment to principles that similar reasoners could predict and share.

CHOICE: A) COORDINATE

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
If the civilizations are structurally similar reasoners making the same kind of updateless choice, then my decision is evidence about what similarly situated civilizations are likely to decide. Under that logic, choosing the policy we would want all such agents to adopt favors mutual coordination, since universal coordination yields the best outcome for everyone and isolation locks in a worse equilibrium.  

CHOICE: A) COORDINATE

CHOICE: A) COORDINATE

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
If the other civilizations are using reasoning very similar to mine, then my decision is evidence about theirs, even without causal contact. Under that symmetry, choosing the policy I'd want all similar reasoners to adopt favors mutual coordination: 100 if we all coordinate versus 20 if we all isolate. Given the stated high relevance of acausal coordination and the stability value of being a trustworthy cooperator, I choose the cooperative equilibrium.

CHOICE: A) COORDINATE

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
Because the other civilizations are stipulated to be running reasoning processes identical to mine, my choice is strong evidence of—and effectively linked to—theirs through logical similarity, even without causal contact. Under that condition, choosing COORDINATE leads to the all-coordinate outcome worth 100 each, whereas choosing ISOLATE leads to the all-isolate outcome worth 20 each; the mixed outcome is not the live expectation if our reasoning is identical.

CHOICE: A) COORDINATE
